papers.title_en: Massively parallel flow routing and drainage area determination
papers.evidence: 大规模并行水流路由算法直接支持城市洪水风险评估
papers.tldr: 数字高程模型规模巨大，传统串行流量路由算法难以高效处理。本文提出基于大规模并行计算的流量路由算法，通过优化进程间通信与计算负载均衡，显著提升性能。在18.8亿高程点模型上，使用12288进程仅需4秒完成水流路径计算，实现了近实时处理。该工作为高分辨率地形水文学分析提供了高效并行解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Digital elevation models (DEMs) have reached resolutions and sizes that only parallel computaters can efficiently process. One important application of DEMs is predicting how much water flows where, the so-called ``flow routing problem'' (a variation of which is the problem of determining the drainage area upstream of a point in a DEM). The traditional algorithm for flow routing is sequential, and attempts to parallelize this method have so far only been moderately successful. Herein, we build on earlier work in Richardson et al. (2014) and propose an algorithm and several variations that can efficiently solve the flow routing problem on very large models with very large numbers of parallel processes. For the largest model we use, with 1.88 billion points, the best algorithm herein can route water in 4.0 seconds on 12,288 processes of a computer cluster.

papers.title_en: MP3: Multi-Period Pattern Pre-training for Spatio-Temporal Forecasting
papers.authors: Lilan Peng, Yandi Liu, Qingren Yao, Chongshou Li, Tianrui Li
papers.evidence: 多周期模式预训练用于时空预测；解决城市数据中的时间幻象，可应用于洪水预测
papers.tldr: 时空数据存在'时域幻象'，即相似短窗口输入可能对应不同未来趋势，现有STGNN难以有效识别。MP3提出多周期模式预训练插件，通过边缘卷积学习多周期时序模式、瓶颈投影和全局记忆库捕获异质空间关系、因果增强Transformer建模跨周期依赖。在5个基线模型和5个数据集上平均MAE降低4.7%、RMSE降低5.0%。MP3即插即用，显著提升现有STGNN性能。
papers.abstract_en: Spatio-Temporal forecasting is crucial in diverse fields, such as transportation, climate, and energy. Urban spatio-temporal data exhibits temporal mirage: similar short-window inputs have divergent future trends, and vice versa. Existing spatio-temporal graph neural networks (STGNNs) cannot effectively identify such mirages. We argue that the core reason lies in the short-window inputs that have incomplete period observation, heterogeneous global spatial correlation, and cross-period superposition causality. To bridge this gap, we develop a novel Multi- Period Pattern Pre-training (MP3), a plug-and-play pre-training plugin for distinguishing temporal mirages. MP3 presents two core innovations: (1) The multi-period pattern learning is designed to learn multi-period patterns from long time series. Specifically, multi-period temporal modeling leverages edge convolution to identify different multi-period patterns. Multi-period spatial modeling uses a bottleneck project and a global memory bank to capture heterogeneous global spatial relations efficiently. Cross-period pattern interaction employs a causality-enhanced Transformer to capture dependencies across different period patterns. (2) This plugin can seamlessly integrate into existing STGNN backbones to strengthen their forecasting performance. The experiment on five STGNN baselines across five real-world datasets (including a large-scale dataset CA) verify the effectiveness, superior scalability and strong adaptability of MP3, which brings consistent and robust performance improvements across all evaluated baselines. On average, MP3 reduces the MAE 4.7% and the RMSE 5.0%. The code can be available at https://github.com/YAN-outlook/MP3.

papers.title_en: Regional Climate Model Emulation with Diffusion Approaches: What is the Added Value of Generative Machine Learning?
papers.authors: Mikel N. Legasa, Antoine Doury, Achille Gellens, Redouane Lguensat, Clara Naldesi, Soulivanh Thao, Mathieu Vrac
papers.evidence: 模拟区域气候模型降尺度降水，与城市洪水风险相关
papers.tldr: 区域气候模型模拟高分辨率降水计算成本高，模拟器通过机器学习降尺度提供廉价替代。本文提出ParamDiffusion，一种两阶段扩散模型，与确定性模型、参数概率模型及标准扩散方法进行比较。建立符合气候学需求的验证框架，重点评估极端降水事件。结果发现扩散方法能高精度重现气候统计特征和空间复合极端，生成具有空间细节的场，但所有模型均未能在不确定性包络内一致覆盖最极端事件。研究表明扩散模型可用于概率性RCM模拟，但需进一步改进以可靠表示高影响极端降水。
papers.abstract_en: Emulators provide a cost-effective alternative to regional climate models (RCMs) by capturing their dynamical downscaling function. They link large-scale predictors simulated by global climate models (GCMs) to RCM-simulated high-resolution fields of the target variable, here precipitation. Machine learning methods, typically deep learning, are cheaper than running RCMs in computation time and energy. Among them, generative models are appealing because they can simulate ensembles of local high-resolution fields consistent with the predictors. This ensemble, which we call the uncertainty envelope, remains to be properly assessed for added value. Here, we make three contributions. First, we introduce ParamDiffusion, a new two-stage diffusion-based framework, and compare it with a state-of-the-art diffusion approach. Second, we expand standard validation through a comprehensive framework aligned with climate-science needs, examining specific precipitation events, including extremes. Third, within this framework, we assess the added value of diffusion approaches relative to deterministic methods. We intercompare four deep-learning models: a deterministic model designed to capture the precipitation tail; a parametric probabilistic model based on it; a recently proposed diffusion approach; and ParamDiffusion, which couples the parametric model with a diffusion model. Our results show that diffusion-based approaches reproduce climatological precipitation statistics with high skill, including distributional tails and spatially compounded extremes, while generating spatially detailed fields. However, none of the assessed models consistently accounts for the most extreme RCM-simulated events within its uncertainty envelope. Diffusion models are therefore promising for probabilistic RCM emulation, but progress is still required before they can reliably represent high-impact precipitation extremes.

papers.evidence: KGE指标用于水文模型，进而用于洪水风险评估
papers.tldr: Kling-Gupta效率(KGE)是水文模型评估指标，但其统计性质未知。本研究将KGE最大化形式化为线性回归的极值估计，推导出KGE回归系数等于OLS系数乘以方差膨胀因子，以匹配训练集方差。关键发现：KGE回归与OLS不能同时最优——OLS最大化NSE，KGE回归以牺牲NSE为代价最大化KGE，且单变量情形下可能无全局最小值。该工作为KGE估计奠定数学基础，阐明其对模型预测性能的影响。
papers.abstract_en: Kling-Gupta efficiency ($\mathrm{KGE}$) is a model performance evaluation metric widely used in hydrology, but its properties as a statistical estimator have remained unexplored. We formalize the Kling-Gupta loss $L_\mathrm{KG} = (1 - \mathrm{KGE})^2$ in an extremum estimation framework (maximizing $\mathrm{KGE}$) for multiple linear regression. We give explicit formulas showing that Kling-Gupta regression scales the ordinary least squares (OLS) coefficient vector by a variance-inflation factor depending on sample variances and covariances. Its predictions reproduce the training set response variance, unlike OLS's variance reduction, while both maintain the response mean and achieve the same sample correlation. We prove that no estimator simultaneously maximizes Nash-Sutcliffe efficiency ($\mathrm{NSE}$) and $\mathrm{KGE}$: OLS maximizes $\mathrm{NSE}$ but not $\mathrm{KGE}$, whereas Kling-Gupta regression maximizes $\mathrm{KGE}$ at the expense of $\mathrm{NSE}$. We establish almost-sure convergence of the Kling-Gupta estimator to well-defined population limits. The training and test set performance metrics for both estimators converge asymptotically to identical limits (different for OLS vs. Kling-Gupta). In a single-predictor model with fixed intercept, we identify conditions where a global minimum of $L_\mathrm{KG}$ does not exist because of discontinuity at zero slope. This work establishes a mathematical foundation for $\mathrm{KGE}$-based estimation and clarifies its effects on predictive performance in hydrologic modeling.

papers.title_en: MP3: Multi-Period Pattern Pre-training forSpatio-Temporal Forecasting
papers.authors: Lilan Peng, Yandi Liu, Qingren Yao, Chongshou Li, Tianrui Li
papers.evidence: 时空预测方法适用于城市暴雨洪水预测
papers.tldr: 时空预测中常出现时间幻象，即短窗输入相似但未来趋势不同。本文提出多周期模式预训练MP3，通过边缘卷积学习多周期时间模式，利用瓶颈投影和全局记忆库捕获异质空间关系，并采用因果增强Transformer建模跨周期依赖。MP3作为即插即用插件可融入现有STGNN，在5个基线5个数据集上平均降低MAE 4.7%、RMSE 5.0%。
papers.abstract_en: Spatio-Temporal forecasting is crucial in diverse fields, such as transportation, climate, and energy. Urban spatio-temporal data exhibits temporal mirage: similar short-window inputs have divergent future trends, and vice versa. Existing spatio-temporal graph neural networks (STGNNs) cannot effectively identify such mirages. We argue that the core reason lies in the short-window inputs that have incomplete period observation, heterogeneous global spatial correlation, and cross-period superposition causality. To bridge this gap, we develop a novel Multi- Period Pattern Pre-training (MP3), a plug-and-play pre-training plugin for distinguishing temporal mirages. MP3 presents two core innovations: (1) The multi-period pattern learning is designed to learn multi-period patterns from long time series. Specifically, multi-period temporal modeling leverages edge convolution to identify different multi-period patterns. Multi-period spatial modeling uses a bottleneck project and a global memory bank to capture heterogeneous global spatial relations efficiently. Cross-period pattern interaction employs a causality-enhanced Transformer to capture dependencies across different period patterns. (2) This plugin can seamlessly integrate into existing STGNN backbones to strengthen their forecasting performance. The experiment on five STGNN baselines across five real-world datasets (including a large-scale dataset CA) verify the effectiveness, superior scalability and strong adaptability of MP3, which brings consistent and robust performance improvements across all evaluated baselines. On average, MP3 reduces the MAE 4.7% and the RMSE 5.0%. The code can be available at https://github.com/YAN-outlook/MP3.
